    Interface IMeshBuilder<TMaterial>

    Represents an utility class to help build meshes by adding primitives associated with a given material.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Geometry
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public interface IMeshBuilder<TMaterial>
    Type Parameters
    Name Description
    TMaterial

    The material type used by this PrimitiveBuilder<TMaterial, TvG, TvM, TvS> instance.

    Properties

    Name Description
    Extras

    Gets or sets the custom data of this object.
    IsEmpty

    Gets a value indicating whether this mesh does not contain any geometry.
    Materials

    Gets a collection of materials used by this mesh.
    Name

    Gets or sets the display text name, or null.

    ⚠️ DO NOT USE AS AN OBJECT ID ⚠️ see remarks.
    Primitives

    Gets a collection of primitives used by this mesh.

    Methods

    Name Description
    Clone(Func<TMaterial, TMaterial>)
    UseMorphTarget(int)
    UsePrimitive(TMaterial, int)

    Creates, or uses an existing primitive using material.
    Validate()
